title: Acme 2020 Annual Report
text: Alice served as CEO of Acme Corp beginning 2020-01-01. The board appointed Alice in New York.

title: Bob verification note
text: Bob verified the Alice Acme CEO statement on 2023-04-05 with confidence 0.93.

title: Conflicting web snippet
text: A low confidence web snippet claims Eve may have been CEO of Acme.

title: Board appointment record
text: The Board of Directors appointed Alice as CEO in New York.
